title: Tsuruhachi and Tsurujiro
actors: Kazuo Hasegawa, Isuzu Yamada, Kamatari Fujiwara
plot: Mr. Tsurujiro is a Japanese folk singer assisted by Ms. Tsuruhachi on the shamisen. The pair is popular, but he nitpicks often on her music and so they split. She marries a benefactor, but after a joint show, feels music is above ...
